# ParagonNodeInfo.PassivePower property

The Power SNO the node grants (when [`SnoPassivePower`](../ParagonNodeDefinition/SnoPassivePower.md) is set), pre-resolved as an asset reference; `null` when the node grants no passive power.

```csharp
public AssetRef? PassivePower { get; set; }
```
